---
title: "About Me"
description: "Learn more about Pawan Jangra — researcher, R programmer, and survey specialist."
toc: true
---

## Hello, I'm Pawan 👋

I'm a **data analyst and field researcher** with over 7 years of experience in survey methodology, statistical analysis, and research coordination across India.

My work sits at the intersection of **economics, statistics, and data science** — translating complex survey data into clear insights that inform policy and research.

## What I Do

I specialize in:

- **Survey Research** — End-to-end survey operations, from questionnaire design to data collection and analysis
- **Statistical Programming** — R (primary), Python, and data pipeline automation
- **Data Visualization** — Creating clear, reproducible visualizations with ggplot2, plotly, and Quarto
- **Labour Economics** — Analysis of PLFS, NSS, and other government microdata
- **Reproducible Research** — Building fully documented, reproducible research workflows

## Tools & Technologies

```{=html}
<div class="skills-grid" style="margin:1.5rem 0;">
  <div class="skill-card"><div class="skill-icon">📊</div><div class="skill-name">R / Tidyverse</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:93%"></div></div></div>
  <div class="skill-card"><div class="skill-icon">🐍</div><div class="skill-name">Python / Pandas</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:78%"></div></div></div>
  <div class="skill-card"><div class="skill-icon">📋</div><div class="skill-name">Quarto / RMarkdown</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:88%"></div></div></div>
  <div class="skill-card"><div class="skill-icon">🗺️</div><div class="skill-name">ODK / Survey CTO</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:90%"></div></div></div>
  <div class="skill-card"><div class="skill-icon">🐧</div><div class="skill-name">Linux / Bash</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:70%"></div></div></div>
  <div class="skill-card"><div class="skill-icon">🌐</div><div class="skill-name">Web Scraping</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-bar-fill" style="width:72%"></div></div></div>
</div>
```

## Education & Training

- **IDEAs Advanced Certificate Programme** on Research in Political Economy (2022–2024)
- Ongoing self-study in econometrics, machine learning, and causal inference

## Publications & Projects

- Analysis of Union Budget allocation trends (2015–2024)
- Periodic Labour Force Survey data processing pipeline in R
- Health financing survey data management — OP Jindal Global University (2025)

## Get in Touch

I'm always open to research collaborations, data analysis consulting, and academic support.

```{=html}
<div class="contact-grid" style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
  <a href="https://github.com/pawan1198" class="contact-card" target="_blank">
    <span class="contact-icon">🐙</span><strong>GitHub</strong>
    <span style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#64748b">@pawan1198</span>
  </a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pawanjangra1198/" class="contact-card" target="_blank">
    <span class="contact-icon">💼</span><strong>LinkedIn</strong>
    <span style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#64748b">pawanjangra1198</span>
  </a>
  <a href="mailto:pawanjangra1198@gmail.com" class="contact-card">
    <span class="contact-icon">📧</span><strong>Email</strong>
    <span style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#64748b">pawanjangra1198@gmail.com</span>
  </a>
</div>
```
